changeSet.author: shaparenko

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM genre WHERE name = 'Action'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO genre (name, description) VALUES ('Action', 'High-energy films with stunts and fights'), ('Comedy', 'Humorous and lighthearted films'), ('Drama', 'Character-driven emotional stories'), ('Horror', 'Films designed to frighten'), ('Sci-Fi', 'Science fiction and futuristic themes'), ('Animated', 'Animation for all ages');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM genre WHERE name IN ('Action','Comedy','Drama','Horror','Sci-Fi','Animated');
